rationale: The citation to Goettler and Clay (2011) appears in a grouped related-literature sentence that says this paper complements work on consumer-side switching costs. It is used for broad positioning only, alongside other references, rather than for a specific mechanism, model component, identification argument, or empirical implementation in the citing paper. The dynamic game, revenue decomposition, and estimation strategy in the citing paper are developed without any distinct reliance on this cited study.
